name: polarisagi-browser-use
description: Control a browser to navigate, click, fill forms, and capture screenshots via Playwright MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Navigate, click, type, and screenshot web pages.
interface.longDescription:
Browser automation via the official Playwright MCP server. Supports navigation, DOM interaction, form filling, and screenshot capture.

Requires: Node.js (npx auto-downloads @playwright/mcp on first use).
defaultPrompt: Navigate to https://example.com and take a screenshot.
Click the login button on the current page.
Fill in the search box with 'AI agents'.
